question_title: Will the interest in “george washington” change between 2026-02-20 and 2026-02-25 according to Google Trends?
summary: George Washington search interest on Feb 20 (PD+4) = 68, with the question asking whether Feb 25 (PD+9) will differ by more than ±3. The dominant signal is post-Presidents' Day decay: 2025 analog shows ~14pt drop from PD+3 to PD+8. The 2026 decline is faster than 2025 (68% of peak at PD+4 vs 80%). Central estimate for Feb 25 is ~63-65, yielding a -3 to -5 change. The Wed>Fri weekday pattern partially counteracts the decline (Wednesdays ~8pts higher than Fridays in 2026 data), and the value is already near normal baseline (~64 for non-PD Wednesdays), limiting further decline. Washington's Birthday on Sunday Feb 22 provides minimal boost. Monte Carlo (center=64, SD=7) yields P(Dec)≈0.55, P(DC)≈0.28, P(Inc)≈0.17.

factors.description: Post-Presidents' Day decay pattern: 2025 analog shows values dropped from 86 (PD+3) to 72 (PD+8), a -14pt decline. 2026 shows even faster decay (68 at PD+4 vs 80 in 2025). Continued decline to ~60-65 by PD+9 is expected.

Wednesday vs Friday weekday effect: Wednesdays score ~8pts higher than Fridays in 2026 data. This weekday pattern partially offsets the post-PD decline when comparing Fri Feb 20 to Wed Feb 25, making the decline less steep.
Washington's Birthday (Feb 22) falls on Sunday in 2026 - minimal boost. In 2025 Saturday=51 vs normal ~40, only mild elevation. Weekend birthday won't meaningfully lift the following Wed.

Feb 20 value of 68 is already close to pre-PD normal weekday baseline (Week 1 Wed=64). By PD+4, most of the post-PD decline has already occurred, limiting further drop. Possible stabilization near baseline.
Base rates from change_stats: decrease_rate=0.40, increase_rate=0.32, no_change_rate=0.28. Decreases are the modal historical outcome for this term in this date window.

reasoning:
**Forecast: "george washington" Google Trends interest Feb 20 → Feb 25**

| Outcome | Probability |
|---------|-------------|
| **Decreases** | **0.57** |
| Doesn't change | 0.28 |
| Increases | 0.15 |

**Key reasoning:**
- Feb 20 (Fri, PD+4) = 68, already declining sharply from the Presidents' Day peak of 100
- Historical 2025 analog shows continued ~14pt decline from PD+3 to PD+8; 2026 is declining even faster
- By Feb 25 (Wed, PD+9), expected value is ~63-65, yielding a change of -3 to -5 (just past the ±3 threshold for "Decreases")
- The Wednesday>Friday weekday pattern (+8pts on avg) and proximity to baseline partially offset the decline, giving meaningful probability to "Doesn't change"
- Washington's Birthday on Sunday Feb 22 provides minimal search boost
- The marginal call between Decreases and Doesn't change reflects that the expected change is right near the -3 threshold
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the interest in “george washington” change between 2026-02-20 and 2026-02-25 according to Google Trends?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42208)
